summary: Frontend TOS (Terms of Service) feature testing - All 7 test cases passed. The Terms of Service checkbox and dialog have been correctly implemented on the Register tab.
test_credentials: N/A - No login required for testing registration form UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: TOS feature fully implemented and working. Key data-testid values: agree-terms-checkbox, open-terms-btn, terms-content, close-terms-btn, register-submit-btn. The checkbox controls the disabled state of the register button correctly.

features_tested.feature: TOS checkbox exists and is unchecked by default
features_tested.notes: Checkbox found with data-testid='agree-terms-checkbox', initially unchecked

features_tested.feature: Create Account button disabled when TOS unchecked
features_tested.notes: Button correctly disabled via disabled prop when !agreedToTerms

features_tested.feature: Create Account button enabled after checking TOS
features_tested.notes: Button becomes enabled when checkbox is checked
Link with data-testid='open-terms-btn' opens Dialog component

features_tested.feature: Terms dialog shows all sections including TOS and Privacy Policy
features_tested.notes: Dialog contains: 'Terms of Service', 'Privacy Policy', 'Acceptance of Terms', 'Information We Collect'

features_tested.feature: Terms dialog has Close button that closes it
features_tested.notes: Close button with data-testid='close-terms-btn' successfully closes dialog
